_comment: Manual licence overrides for npm packages whose own package.json doesn't declare one. license-checker-rseidelsohn flags these as UNKNOWN; we clarify them here. Each entry must include licenses, licenseText, and a SHA-256 checksum of the licenseText (computed automatically on first run if omitted via --no-clarificationsCheckChecksums, but we keep them strict).

@mapbox/jsonlint-lines-primitives@2.0.2.licenseText:

ACTION OF CONTRACT, TORT OR OTHERWISE, ARISING FROM, OUT OF OR IN

SOFTWARE.
